title: astragalus montanus
intro: Astragalus montanus is a type of perennial plant that belongs to the legume family. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and is also known as Chinese milk vetch. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its rich medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that help to protect the body against disease. Astragalus montanus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are taken to promote immune function, reduce stress, and improve overall health and well-being.
